description_long: This is a large, single-story log cabin with a dark brown, multi-gabled roof and prominent wooden log construction. The facade features several peaked roof sections, each with its own entrance or window arrangement, and the structure is set on a landscaped plot with stone pathways and trimmed hedges. The front of the cabin displays a symmetrical arrangement of windows and doors, with covered porches and exposed log beams adding to its rustic charm. The roof includes multiple chimneys and deep overhangs, while the sides and rear show additional entrances and landscaped walkways. The windows are mostly rectangular and vary in size, grouped in pairs or singles, and the doors are wooden and blend with the log exterior. The overall appearance is robust and inviting, suitable for a residential neighborhood or a scenic park setting.
description: A large, rustic log cabin with a dark multi-gabled roof, prominent wooden beams, and landscaped surroundings. Features multiple windows, covered porches, and stone pathways.
description_view_0: The front view shows the main facade with three prominent gabled sections, multiple windows, two main entrances, and landscaped hedges and pathways.
description_view_1: The left side view highlights the depth of the cabin, a side entrance, and the continuation of the landscaped path and hedges.
description_view_2: The rear view reveals additional windows, a secondary entrance, and a more private section of the garden with fewer architectural details.
description_view_3: The right side view displays another gabled section, a side porch, and a curved pathway leading to the rear, with visible landscaping.
attribute_roof_type: multi-gabled roof with deep overhangs and multiple chimneys, constructed from dark shingles
attribute_window_arrangement: Multiple rectangular windows of varying sizes, arranged symmetrically across the front facade, with some grouped in pairs and others as singles; additional windows are distributed along the sides and rear, maintaining a balanced but not perfectly symmetrical pattern
attribute_door_placement: Two main exterior doors are centered on the front facade beneath the gabled sections, with additional side and rear entrances visible on the left and right sides
